scripts.build:plugin: npm run build --workspace @use-voltra/expo-plugin && npm run build:expo-plugin --workspace @use-voltra/ios-client && npm run build:expo-plugin --workspace @use-voltra/android-client
scripts.clean:plugin: npm run clean --workspace @use-voltra/expo-plugin && npm run clean:expo-plugin --workspace @use-voltra/ios-client && npm run clean:expo-plugin --workspace @use-voltra/android-client
scripts.format:check: npm run format:js:check && npm run format:check --workspace @use-voltra/android-client && npm run format:check --workspace @use-voltra/ios-client
scripts.format:fix: npm run format:js:fix && npm run format:fix --workspace @use-voltra/android-client && npm run format:fix --workspace @use-voltra/ios-client
scripts.test:native: npm run test:kotlin --workspace @use-voltra/android-client && npm run test:swift --workspace @use-voltra/ios-client
scripts.test:all: npm run test:js && npm run test:native
scripts.test:kotlin:pre-push: git diff --quiet origin/main...HEAD -- packages/android-client || turbo run test:kotlin --filter=@use-voltra/android-client
scripts.test:swift:pre-push: git diff --quiet origin/main...HEAD -- packages/ios-client || turbo run test:swift --filter=@use-voltra/ios-client
